events.title: George Michael would have been 63
events.blurb: George Michael was a British singer, songwriter and record producer

angles.name: 80s icon
angles.copy: Remembering George Michael on his birthday, the man behind some of the biggest hits of the 80s and 90s, he would have been 63 today

events.title: Michael Jackson died 47 years ago
events.blurb: Michael Jackson was an American singer, songwriter and dancer

angles.name: king of pop
angles.copy: Today marks 47 years since the death of the king of pop Michael Jackson, we remember his incredible music and legacy

events.title: Ringo Starr turns 86
events.blurb: Ringo Starr is a British musician and singer, best known as the drummer for the Beatles

angles.name: beatles legend
angles.copy: Ringo Starr turns 86 today, the legendary drummer of one of the most influential bands in history, the Beatles

events.title: Brian May turns 74
events.blurb: Brian May is a British musician, singer, songwriter and astrophysicist, best known as the lead guitarist of Queen

angles.name: queen legend
angles.copy: Brian May turns 74 today, the iconic lead guitarist and singer of rock legends Queen

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: Mick Jagger is a British singer, songwriter and actor, best known as the lead singer of the Rolling Stones

angles.name: rolling stones legend
angles.copy: Mick Jagger turns 83 today, the iconic frontman of the Rolling Stones, one of the most influential bands in rock history

events.title: MTV launched 47 years ago
events.blurb: MTV was launched in 1981, initially focusing on music videos

angles.name: music tv revolution
angles.copy: MTV launched 47 years ago today, revolutionizing the music industry with 24/7 music videos, its first video was Buggles - Video Killed The Radio Star

events.title: Oasis released Definitely Maybe 32 years ago
events.blurb: Definitely Maybe is the debut studio album by English rock band Oasis

angles.name: britpop classic
angles.copy: Oasis released their iconic debut album Definitely Maybe 32 years ago today, a pivotal moment in the britpop movement

events.title: Woodstock Festival took place 57 years ago
events.blurb: The Woodstock Music & Art Fair was a three-day music festival held in 1969

angles.name: peace and music
angles.copy: The iconic Woodstock Festival took place 57 years ago today, a celebration of peace, love and music that defined a generation

events.title: Elvis Presley died 49 years ago
events.blurb: Elvis Presley was an American singer, musician and actor, known as the king of rock and roll

angles.name: king of rock
angles.copy: Elvis Presley, the king of rock and roll, died 49 years ago today, leaving behind a legacy of incredible music and iconic style

events.title: Tupac Shakur was shot 30 years ago
events.blurb: Tupac Shakur was an American rapper, actor and social activist

angles.name: hip hop legend
angles.copy: Tupac Shakur was shot 30 years ago today, his legacy as a hip hop legend and social activist continues to inspire and influence new generations

events.title: Jimi Hendrix died 56 years ago
events.blurb: Jimi Hendrix was an American rock guitarist, singer and songwriter

angles.name: guitar legend
angles.copy: Jimi Hendrix, one of the most influential guitarists in rock history, died 56 years ago today, his music and legacy continue to inspire and awe

events.title: The Beatles released Abbey Road 57 years ago
events.blurb: Abbey Road is the eleventh studio album by the English rock band the Beatles

angles.name: beatles classic
angles.copy: The Beatles released their iconic album Abbey Road 57 years ago today, featuring some of the band's most beloved songs

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: Chrissie Hynde is an American singer, songwriter and guitarist, best known as the lead singer of the Pretenders

angles.name: pretenders legend
angles.copy: Chrissie Hynde turns 75 today, the iconic lead singer of the Pretenders, known for her powerful voice and hit songs like Brass in Pocket

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Liam Gallagher is an English singer and songwriter, best known as the lead singer of Oasis

angles.name: oasis frontman
angles.copy: Liam Gallagher turns 54 today, the iconic frontman of Oasis, known for his powerful voice and charismatic stage presence

events.title: John Lennon released Imagine 51 years ago
events.blurb: Imagine is the second solo album by John Lennon

angles.name: beatles legend
angles.copy: John Lennon released his iconic album Imagine 51 years ago today, featuring the timeless title track and other classic songs

events.title: Apple released the first iPod 25 years ago

angles.name: tech revolution
angles.copy: Apple released the first iPod 25 years ago today, revolutionizing the way we listen to music on the go

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: James Bond is a fictional character created by author Ian Fleming

angles.name: bond james bond
angles.copy: It's James Bond Day, a celebration of the iconic spy and his many adventures in film and literature

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: John Lennon was a British singer, songwriter and peace activist, best known as a member of the Beatles

angles.name: beatles legend
